rationale: Gov't Code §1372.023 governs allocation of the state ceiling for qualified mortgage bonds to TDHCA. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 1372.023. DEDICATION OF PORTIONS OF STATE CEILING TO TEXAS DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND COMMUNITY AFFAIRS.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule addresses bond ceiling allocation, not property tax homestead exemptions.
